title: Strange Evangelion DVD
wikitext:
[]: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by TheGreatNooN » Sun Jul 29, 2018 10:43 am SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jul 31, 2018 4:36 pm So, was the DVD set an ADV release? If so, which one? (They’ve made at least, like, 5 different box-set collections for the series.)

[]: Re: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 31, 2018 9:23 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: So, was the DVD set an ADV release? If so, which one?

[]: Re: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Thu Aug 16, 2018 8:26 pm I literally just watched a video on youtube that talked about this and the person actually got a response from Madman Entertainment about the creepy porn clip. Here's a link to it https://youtu.be/b0FXKCRurdE

[]: Re: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Aug 17, 2018 6:19 am ^ It's one of those annoying videos that beat around the bush to get over the 10 minute mark. Long story short, it was an authoring mistake, but we don't know more. I'm kinda baffled tho, I was sure, this was a creepy pasta or some kind of ARG, lol.

[]: Re: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Fri Aug 17, 2018 9:24 pm robersora wrote: ^ I was sure, this was a creepy pasta

[]: Re: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Aug 18, 2018 9:37 am robersora wrote: It's one of those annoying videos that beat around the bush to get over the 10 minute mark

[]: Re: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Aug 18, 2018 3:07 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You know, sometimes it's about the journey rather than the destination .

[]: Re: ”Strange” Evangelion DVD             Quote Post by 天使 | Nyo | 天使 » Tue Nov 05, 2019 2:14 pm [Apologies in advance for such a late reply on this topic. I know this is old at this point. ] Yeah, I personally hate that stuff with stretching stuff out to 10 minutes just for Ad Revenue. It's just pathetic, like, just add more information or your own thoughts to the topic at hand if it's not long enough. There's better ways to extend the running time. As for the DVD, I've seen videos about and might actually go out and find a copy of this DVD just for sake of having it in a collection. Definitely would be freaky to show to a friend or something (I've already introduced one person to Eva, going to introduce it to my E-BF soon.) I've already considered getting all the DVD volumes (of course, I'd get the Blu-Ray ones too if I could afford it.) Spooky stuff, man. But people make mistakes, guess you can't blame them for that.
